$comment: Tools-under-test for the benchmark. Each entry is an MCP server launched over stdio (mcpServers-style: command + args + env). Add your own MCP tool here to benchmark it against the others - no code changes required. 'displayName' is the label shown to the model; 'argDefaults' merges per-tool-name argument defaults into every matching MCP tool call (e.g. forcing allow_overwrite on save).
